title: Is the Australian Prime Minister’s Pragmatism Enough in Uncertain Times?
summary_full: Buffeted by global turmoil and a populist far-right ascendance at home, Anthony Albanese is trying to keep the country feeling hopeful.
summary_public: Buffeted by global turmoil and a populist far-right ascendance at home, Anthony Albanese is trying to keep the country feeling hopeful.
